chore(deps): upgrade recharts to 3.8.0 with breaking changes fixes (#898)

* chore(deps): upgrade recharts to 3.8.0 with breaking changes fixes

rechartsをv2.15.4からv3.8.0へアップグレードし、破壊的な型変更に対応しました。

## 変更内容

### パッケージ更新
- recharts: 2.15.4 → 3.8.0

### 型定義の修正
recharts 3.xでは型定義が大幅に変更されたため、以下の対応を実施：

#### Chart.tsx
- `ChartTooltipContentProps`: 型定義を recharts 3.x の `TooltipPayload` と `TooltipPayloadEntry` を使用するように修正
- `ChartLegendContentProps`: `LegendPayload` を使用するように修正
- Tooltip/Legendコンポーネントの型アノテーションを追加（`.filter()`、`.map()` のコールバック引数）
- `item.dataKey` の key 使用時に型安全な変換を追加
- `item.value` の型アサーションを追加

#### LogsAnalyticsTab/index.tsx
- `labelFormatter` の引数型を `React.ReactNode` に変更（recharts 3.x の新しい型定義に対応）
- `BarChart` の `data` プロパティに型アサーションを追加

## 修正したエラー
- ✅ `Property 'payload' does not exist on type` エラー
- ✅ `Property 'label' does not exist on type` エラー
- ✅ `Parameter 'item' implicitly has an 'any' type` エラー
- ✅ `Type does not satisfy the constraint` エラー
- ✅ `labelFormatter` 型の不一致エラー

## テスト結果
- ✅ `pnpm install` - 成功
- ✅ `pnpm typecheck` - 成功（全パッケージ）

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

### Chart.tsx
- `item.dataKey` と `item.name` の型チェックを追加
- `@typescript-eslint/restrict-template-expressions` エラーを解決
- テンプレートリテラルで使用する前に型を検証

## テスト結果

- ✅ `pnpm typecheck` - 成功

commit.message:
fix: add empty resources/prompts handlers for Windsurf compatibility (v1.2.1)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: watchdog trailing stop must use ExitManager price as source of truth

Post-mortem: 咕咕嘎嘎 ran +259% and was tracked correctly by ExitManager
at peak $0.00003606. Watchdog's Layer 3 DexScreener batch endpoint returned
a stale/different price of $0.00001662 — less than half. This was stored as
the HWM in trailing-stops.json, causing the trailing stop to fire when the
real price was still far above entry. Sold at $3.62 on a position worth ~$16.

Two fixes in the main watchdog check() loop:

Layer 4 price override (after Layer 3 Jupiter fallback):
- Load ExitManager positions and call getExitManagerPrice(sym) for each
- Override market[sym].price with the confirmed ExitManager price before
  anything downstream (livePortfolio build, HWM update, trailing stop scan)
  reads from the market map

HWM merge (after updateHighWaterMarks):
- For each ExitManager-tracked symbol, if pos.peakPrice > trailingData HWM,
  update HWM to ExitManager's observed peak
- Ensures watchdog trailing stop can never fire against a lower stale peak
  than what ExitManager confirmed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(java): Use implementation for composite build dependencies

The tests module had testImplementation dependencies on proto and client
from the composite build (client/java). In CI, when the module has no
main sources (compileJava NO-SOURCE), Gradle's dependency substitution
for composite builds can fail to resolve testImplementation dependencies
correctly.

The fix is to use implementation instead of testImplementation for the
composite build dependencies. Since the tests module has no main sources
or consumers, there's no risk of dependency leakage.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

commit.message:
fix: render non-ASCII token symbols (CJK, emoji) as hex tag in dashboard

Tokens like 咕咕嘎嘎 render as ???????? in blessed because each CJK
character produces two unrenderable bytes. Added safeSymbol() which
passes ASCII-printable symbols through unchanged and converts any
non-ASCII symbol to a short 4-hex-digit tag (#A3F2) derived from the
character codes — deterministic, collision-resistant, and always
printable. Applied to all display points: holdings table, positions
section, market ticker, history box, market intelligence holdings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Move OCR to Swift, add screenpipe-inspired optimizations

- Move Vision OCR from Python (pyobjc) into Swift CaptureEngine with
  background DispatchQueue pipelining. OCR runs concurrently with
  next capture cycle.
- Add accessibility tree text extraction (~1ms vs 40-200ms OCR)
- Add OCR result caching keyed by dhash with TTL and LRU eviction
- Add input activity monitoring for adaptive capture rates
- Add incognito/private browser detection via AppleScript
- Add thermal state and battery-aware interval adjustment
- Prioritized text pipeline: cache → AX tree → pipelined Vision OCR
- POST body gains ocr_text, urls, and text_source fields
- Python daemon skips ocr_fast when Swift provides text

commit.message:
Replace screen recording with step-by-step capture wizard

Instead of continuous recording with auto-detection, screen mode now
uses a guided wizard:
1. User starts screen share
2. App says "Navigate to your first page, then click Capture"
3. User navigates, clicks Capture -> screenshot taken
4. App says "Step N captured! Navigate to next page"
5. Repeat until user clicks Finish
6. Each capture = exactly one SOP step

This eliminates all frame deduplication, scene detection, and
text-image mismatch issues for screen recordings.

fix: hoist execution out of try block in stop-loss bypass path

const execution declared inside try{} was referenced after the finally{}
block — block-scoped const cannot escape the try, causing ReferenceError:
Cannot access 'execution' before initialization on the res.json() call.
Changed to let execution = null before the try block.

commit.message:
Bypass Vercel image optimization for article thumbnails to stay within 5k quota

1. Add `unoptimized` prop to all 13 <Image> components that display article
   thumbnails (across 6 files). This tells Next.js to serve images directly
   from our /api/og-image proxy without routing through /_next/image, which
   eliminates all Vercel image optimization charges for these images.

2. Tighten backend Pillow WebP compression: quality 70→55, method 4→6,
   explicit lossless=False. This reduces ~143KB images to ~70KB, making
   the unoptimized delivery fast for end users.

3. Upgrade og-image proxy Cache-Control to 1-year immutable
   (max-age=31536000, immutable) so Vercel's edge network caches the
   result permanently without revalidation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix: GLM NaN, Polars compat, naming collision, exposure calc

- Remove use_earliest param from str.to_datetime() (not in Polars 0.20)
- Fix TripSimulator exposure_years to use actual trip duration, not
  accumulated index-based formula (was producing ~0.0001 year values
  causing log(exposure) → -inf → GLM NaN deviance)
- Add start_params=zeros to Poisson GLM to ensure stable initial deviance
- Drop zero-variance features before GLM to prevent NaN
- Rename glm_features param to glm_feature_subset to avoid shadowing
  the glm_features() method in TelematicsScoringPipeline
- Fix credibility test to use drivers with explicitly different trip counts
- Add filterwarnings to pytest config

Result: 84/84 tests passing on Databricks serverless.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: insurance-telematics
repository.description: HMM-based driving state classification and GLM-compatible risk scoring from raw telematics trip data

commit.message:
refactor(i18n): use globe selector and remove openmoji flags (#65)

* fix: address all issues from code audit report

Fix all actionable findings from CODE_AUDIT.md across severity levels.

High (§4.1):
- Fix French meta description typo: "base a" → "basé à" in _data.ts and
  _config.ts (affects <meta name="description"> and /fr/feed.xml)

Medium (§3.1, §3.2, §8.1, §2.2):
- Change color-scheme: light → light dark so native browser chrome adopts
  dark appearance when the OS dark mode is active
- Add semantic tokens --fgColor-success, --borderColor-success,
  --borderColor-navActive; replace hardcoded hex values in layout.css and
  components.css
- Update anti-flash.js to sync aria-pressed on #theme-toggle at
  DOMContentLoaded so screen readers get the correct state before
  theme-toggle.js initializes
- Remove legacy data-color-scheme attribute from anti-flash.js and its
  redundant CSS selectors from base.css and components.css (§4.3)
- Document resolvePostDate mutable default parameter in JSDoc

Low (§8.2, §6.1, §1.1, §2.3, §4.4, §9.2, §2.4, §11, §3.4, §7.2, §1.2, §1.3):
- Remove redundant aria-label from <select> in Header.tsx; the associated
  <label for="language-select"> already provides the accessible name
- Refactor formatReadingTime and formatPostCount to typed lookup tables
  (as const satisfies Record<SiteLanguage, ...>); catches missing translations
  at compile time
- Add module-level JSDoc to i18n.ts documenting the internal/external key
  duality (TypeScript camelCase vs. URL kebab-case)
- Add // @ts-check and /// <reference lib="webworker" /> to sw.js for
  basic JSDoc type checking at authoring time
- Add clarifying comments to sw.js: bot detection secondary-safeguard note
  and feed cache integrity limitation
- Extract buildCounterKey() helper in otel.ts to document the \x00 separator
  rationale; replace the inline key expression
- Add lazy middleware registration comment in otel.ts explaining the
  { once: true } event listener pattern
- Add @media (prefers-reduced-transparency: reduce) block to base.css with
  opaque fallbacks for semi-transparent selection and accent backgrounds
- Add content-visibility: auto and contain-intrinsic-size to .archive-year
  for off-screen rendering performance
- Add TODO comment for scroll-state() sticky sidebar (blocked on dprint
  CSS formatter support)
- Add MULTILANGUAGE_DATA_ALIASES comment explaining the aliasing invariant
  and update requirement in _config.ts
- Add robots() disallow list comment explaining why entries are enumerated
  manually rather than derived from LANGUAGE_PREFIX

* fix(i18n): compact language selector with native flag options

* refactor(i18n): use octicon globe and remove language flags

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Surface LLM errors to client, fix sandbox-manager tests

Pi SDK silently consumed API errors (auth failures, bad model, rate
limits) — the user saw "Thinking..." then immediately "Agent is idle"
with no feedback. Now intercept error messages in the subscribe callback
and inject them as assistant text so they appear in the chat bubble.
Also surface auto_retry_start/end events.

Fix sandbox-manager tests: exec() calls isContainerRunning() internally
which needs a mocked execSync response, and the "no container" test now
reflects the auto-provisioning behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add comprehensive AI chatbot documentation for Record Sales and Add Products

**MAJOR IMPROVEMENTS:**

1. **Comprehensive "Record Sales" Guide (3500+ words)**
   - 10 detailed steps covering entire sales workflow
   - Nigerian business examples (Musa's electronics shop)
   - Receipt sharing: WhatsApp, Email, Copy, Download, Print
   - Credit sales, payment methods, customer details
   - Cart visibility and item selection
   - Business name on receipts
   - Complete troubleshooting section

2. **Comprehensive "Add Products" Guide (600+ lines)**
   - 11 sections covering ALL product fields
   - Required vs optional fields explained
   - 8 categories with specific attributes (Fashion, Electronics, Food, etc.)
   - Product variants (sizes, colors, multi-option products)
   - Multi-image upload with tier limits
   - Product specifications for AI chatbot
   - Profit calculator, bulk import (CSV)
   - 5 real Nigerian business examples
   - Complete troubleshooting section

3. **Enhanced Keywords for RAG Search (80+ new keywords)**
   - Receipt actions: 'send receipt', 'email receipt', 'share receipt', 'receipt modal'
   - Business branding: 'company name on receipt', 'business name on receipt'
   - Cart: 'cart visibility', 'see cart', 'view cart', 'items in cart'
   - Product fields: 'required fields', 'product variants', 'product images'
   - Categories: 'category-specific fields', 'fashion category', 'electronics category'
   - Nigerian context: 'naira pricing', 'computer village', 'indomie', 'ankara'

4. **Fixed Syntax Errors**
   - Removed nested backticks in template literals
   - Fixed all code block formatting

**IMPACT:**
- RAG search now successfully retrieves documentation for 18/18 test queries
- Chatbot transformed from giving wrong answers to providing accurate, detailed responses
- Receipt queries now return perfect results (score: 850/1000)
- Add product queries fully supported with comprehensive examples

**TEST RESULTS:**
✅ "how do i send receipt after sales" - Score: 850 (previously failed)
✅ "i want to send receipt via email" - Score: 800 (previously failed)
✅ "will my company name be on receipt" - Score: 360 (previously failed)
✅ "how to create product variants" - Score: 830
✅ "how to upload multiple images" - Score: 440
✅ All 18 test queries retrieve correct documentation

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

commit.message:
fix: ExitManager price feed, portfolio desync, and ghost partial stop

Exit-manager price feed (fix 1):
- fetchMintPrice now falls back to Jupiter Price API v2 when DexScreener
  returns no price for a fresh bonding-curve token — no more +0.0% holds
  while waiting for DexScreener to index the pair

In-process price state (fix 2 + 3 foundation):
- Added _lastKnownPrices and _priceConfirmed in-process maps in ExitManager
- Populated on every successful price fetch in tick()
- Cleared on recordSniperBuy so re-buys require fresh confirmation
- Exported getExitManagerPrice() and isPriceConfirmed()

Portfolio price desync (fix 2):
- portfolio.js imports getExitManagerPrice and overrides market-map price
  for ExitManager-tracked tokens after all pricing layers complete
- Ensures portfolio shows the same confirmed price as ExitManager (e.g.
  $4.94 from Jupiter instead of inflated $21 from stale DexScreener entry)

Ghost partial stop (fix 3):
- Fast watchdog loop now calls loadSniperPositions + isPriceConfirmed before
  building microHoldings for scanPartialStops
- ExitManager-tracked tokens are excluded from stop scans until ExitManager
  has confirmed at least one valid non-zero price — prevents immediate false
  fires when entry-prices.json has an inflated market-map price

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Optimize draft prompt saving - only on branch switch or page close

Previously, the draft prompt was saved to the backend on every keystroke,
causing typing lag. Now drafts are only saved when:
- Switching between branches (saves old draft before loading new)
- Closing/leaving the page (using sendBeacon for reliability)
- Sending a message (clears draft)

Changes:
- Remove keystroke-based draft saving useEffect
- Add draft saving to branch switch logic
- Add beforeunload handler with sendBeacon
- Create /api/branches/draft POST endpoint for sendBeacon compatibility

commit.message:
Fix Cash Out button hidden on mobile — flex layout overflow

The Cash Out button was being clipped off-screen on mobile because
SingleBetView's flex-1 couldn't shrink below its content height
(CSS flex min-height defaults to 'auto'). Added min-h-0 to allow
shrinking, overflow-y-auto for scrollability, and shrink-0 on the
bottom buttons section to guarantee visibility. Also tightened
vertical spacing to reduce need for scrolling.

commit.message:
Fix 404 errors when creating new branches

The issue was a race condition where:
1. Client creates a branch with a temporary client-side ID
2. UI immediately tries to update branch status in database
3. But the branch doesn't exist in DB yet (created during sandbox setup)

Fixes:
- Pass server-side branchId back to client when sandbox creation completes
- Replace temporary client ID with actual server ID in branch-list.tsx
- Update handleUpdateBranch to handle ID replacement and update activeBranchId
- Skip database calls for branches still in "creating" status
- Skip draft prompt saving while branch is being created

commit.message:
feat: 要素の選択とコピー&ペースト機能を追加 (#2)

* feat: 要素の選択とコピー&ペースト機能を追加

- クリックで要素を選択（青アウトラインでハイライト）
- ⌘C/Ctrl+Cで選択要素をコピー
- ⌘V/Ctrl+Vで選択要素の直後にペースト（名前に " (copy)" を付与）
- ネストされたコンテナは子要素ごとディープコピー
- viewport外クリックまたは同じ要素の再クリックで選択解除

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: render後の選択状態同期とドラッグ&ドロップ後の選択リセット

- render()末尾でupdateSelection()を呼びDOM同期を確保
- ドラッグ&ドロップ並べ替え後にselectedPathをリセットしてstale参照を防止

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Switch ComStock profile generation to single-model selection

Previously, profiles were computed by weighted-averaging all matching
ComStock models. Users now select one representative model explicitly,
which is much faster (one parquet read vs. N) and gives more control.

Changes:
- Schema: replace comstockMatchCount with comstockBldgId on LoadProfile
- generate-profile: single-model query + scale by sqft ratio
- generate-upgrade-profile: single-model upgrade parquet lookup
- API generate-profile: accept bldgId instead of filter params
- API generate-upgrade-profile: derive bldgId from stored comstockBldgId
- ComstockModelPicker: interactive search + select table (replaces informational list)
- LoadProfileTab: model picker inline before first generate; "Change model" button when profile exists

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
